mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.day AS "day", a.money AS "money", a.last_sign_date AS "lastSignDate", a.award_money AS "awardMoney", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sign( id, day, money, last_sign_date, award_money, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{day}, #{money}, #{lastSignDate}, #{awardMoney}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_sign SET day = #{day}, money = #{money}, last_sign_date = #{lastSignDate}, award_money = #{awardMoney}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
